LAW AND MOTION, THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: AS TO DENEEN M. JONES' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, $175.00 IS TO BE WITHHELD FROM THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S EARNINGS PER PAY PERIOD. 50% OF THE FUNDS HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER ARE TO BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR, AND 50% OF THE FUNDS HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER ARE TO BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. A REVIEW HEARING IS SET FOR FEBRUARY 26, 2019 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION. THE COURT WILL SIGN AND MAIL OUT A FORMAL ORDER TO THE PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court vacates the tentative ruling of hearing required as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DENEEN JONES.

off calendar. No appearance by either party.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear. No appearances made at hearing. The Court rules as follows: As to Deneen M. Jones' Claim of Exemption, $175.00 is to be withheld from the judgment debtor's earnings per pay period. 50% of the funds held by the levying officer are to be released to the judgment creditor, and 50% of the funds held by the levying officer are to be released to the judgment debtor. A review hearing is set for February 26, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. The Court will sign and mail out a formal order to the parties and the Sheriff's Department.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/HK)

AMENDED HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is taken off calendar as a duplicative entry. (302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Famr Mutual Automobile Insurance.
Monica Ha, Claims' Representative for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Deneen M. Jones.
Default was entered against defendant on September 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 22, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Co., and against the Defaulted Defendant Deneen M. Jones as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,115.67.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,847.20.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $405.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $35,368.37.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
